sources.title: The future of software in the age of AI - Deloitte US
sources.snippet: AI is transforming the software industry. Discover key AI software development trends and strategies companies can embrace to reap the benefits of embedding AI into software development.
sources.content: AI is transforming the software industry. Discover key AI software development trends and strategies companies can embrace to reap the benefits of embedding AI into software development.

sources.title: Impact of AI on the 2025 Software Engineering Job Market
sources.snippet: The widespread adoption of generative AI since late 2022 has triggered a structural, not cyclical, shift in the software engineering labor market . This is not a simple productivity boost; it is a fundamental rebalancing of value, skills, and career trajectories. The most significant, data-backed impact is a "hollowing out" of the entry-level pipeline. A recent Stanford study reveals a 13% ...
sources.content: The widespread adoption of generative AI since late 2022 has triggered a structural, not cyclical, shift in the software engineering labor market . This is not a simple productivity boost; it is a fundamental rebalancing of value, skills, and career trajectories. The most significant, data-backed impact is a "hollowing out" of the entry-level pipeline. A recent Stanford study reveals a 13% ...

sources.title: How Will AI Affect the US Labor Market? - Goldman Sachs
sources.snippet: The effect of AI is already being felt in particular niches of the US economy, says Joseph Briggs, who co-leads the global economics team in Goldman Sachs Research. "You can see AI's impact in the tech sector, where the employment share as a proportion of the whole economy has gone below the long term trend," he says. How will AI impact jobs?
sources.content: The effect of AI is already being felt in particular niches of the US economy, says Joseph Briggs, who co-leads the global economics team in Goldman Sachs Research. "You can see AI's impact in the tech sector, where the employment share as a proportion of the whole economy has gone below the long term trend," he says. How will AI impact jobs?

sources.title: Artificial Intelligence (AI) Software Market Share, Size, Trends ...
sources.snippet: What Is The Artificial Intelligence ( AI ) Software Market Size and Share 2026? The artificial intelligence ( AI ) software market size has grown exponentially in recent years. It will grow from $292.71 billion in 2025 to $386.08 billion in 2026 at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 31.9%. The growth in the historic period can be attributed to growth in adoption of enterprise AI solutions ...
sources.content: What Is The Artificial Intelligence ( AI ) Software Market Size and Share 2026? The artificial intelligence ( AI ) software market size has grown exponentially in recent years. It will grow from $292.71 billion in 2025 to $386.08 billion in 2026 at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 31.9%. The growth in the historic period can be attributed to growth in adoption of enterprise AI solutions ...

sources.title: Leading AI-driven software organizations show the way | McKinsey
sources.snippet: This article examines two key shifts and three essential enablers that high-performing software organizations use to maximize the potential of incorporating AI into software development.
sources.content: This article examines two key shifts and three essential enablers that high-performing software organizations use to maximize the potential of incorporating AI into software development.
